not_in_scope_yet: Onboarding/intake → DB request-field mapping (needs Laravel route/controller manifest)
Wizard blade vs DB read source (needs view manifest or AST)
Wizard save vs public profile display (needs shared display contract + sampling)

roadmap.title: Wizard / public profile view audit
roadmap.detail: Add a repo-root manifest (YAML) mapping field_key → primary blade source, or scan resources/views/matrimony/profile-wizard for $profile-> access; compare to public profile templates.

roadmap.title: Sampled row-level checks
roadmap.detail: For N profiles, detect populated duplicate semantic columns or NULL in public display path (requires display layer contract).

notes: Bindings use regex over Blade text; dynamic indirect access may false-positive missing_render.
Extend data_lineage.yml as new wizard/public fields stabilize.

mismatch.warning: Column 'city' missing on 'users'; skipped generic mismatch.
